summary: Comprehensive testing of upmuch CRM deployment. Successfully verified all core functionality including landing page, super admin login, dashboard with stats, and navigation to all required pages (Leads, Deals, Tasks, Settings, Admin). Backend APIs working with 83.3% success rate. Frontend UI fully functional with proper authentication and page routing.

minor.issue: Expects JSON body but test was sending query parameters - API format mismatch
Returns 401 'Failed to fetch subscribers' - likely requires Kit.com secret key instead of public key

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly at / with proper branding and navigation
Super admin login successful with florian@unyted.world / DavidConstantin18
Dashboard page loads after login with welcome message and stats (0 leads, 0 deals, 0 tasks, €0 pipeline)
Leads page accessible with search functionality and 'Add Lead' button
Deals page accessible with 6-stage pipeline (Lead, Qualified, Proposal, Negotiation, Won, Lost)
Tasks page accessible with Kanban board (To Do, In Progress, Done)
Settings page accessible with profile info and tabs (Profile, Organization, Billing & Invoices, Integrations)
Admin page accessible for super admin user
API health check at /api/ returns correct response
Super admin authentication and role verification
Admin stats endpoint working (1 user, 1 organization, €0 revenue)
Admin users list working (shows Florian user)
Admin organizations list working (shows Fintery Ltd organization)
Kit.com account info endpoint working (1 form, 0 tags)

deployment_verification.landing_page: ✓ Working - proper branding, navigation, and call-to-action buttons
deployment_verification.authentication: ✓ Working - super admin login successful with role verification
deployment_verification.dashboard: ✓ Working - shows personalized welcome, stats, and quick actions
deployment_verification.navigation: ✓ Working - all required pages accessible via direct URLs
deployment_verification.api_health: ✓ Working - /api/ endpoint returns correct API info
deployment_verification.admin_access: ✓ Working - super admin can access admin panel and functions
deployment_verification.crm_features: ✓ Working - leads, deals, tasks pages load with proper UI components

integrations.kit_com: Partially working (account info accessible, subscribers require secret key)
integrations.resend: Configured (TEST MODE - only sends to florian@unyted.world)
